diff: The exposure limit is the maximum amount of account value, defined in USD based on current value of assets and positions, inclusive of collateral, idle liquidity pending loan issuance, and repaid loan proceeds pending withdrawal or reinvestment, that may be held within each approved venue or under management of each collateral agent.
